bird.name: Mindanao brown dove
bird.summary: The Mindanao brown dove (Phapitreron brunneiceps) is a threatened species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is endemic to forests on the…

relations.subject: Mindanao brown dove
relations.evidence: On Mindanao, it is typically found in tropical moist montane forest
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Mindanao brown dove
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss and hunting
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Mindanao brown dove
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss and hunting
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: Mindanao brown dove
relations.evidence: Consideredl rare in its range threats include habitat loss and hunting for both food and the exotic pet trade. Illegal logging is not as rampant at high elevations, because most trees are not commercially valuable and the slopes are too steep to be converted to farmland
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
